note: Finished batch_size implementation, committed as 1ebb256 (parent 5c1239b). Summary: added batch_size:int|None=None kwarg to Option.__init__ (validated: TypeError if set without multiple=True, ValueError if negative), stored as self.batch_size, exposed in Option.to_info_dict() (always present, None when unset). Batching logic lives in the shared Parameter.type_cast_value() in core.py, guarded via getattr(self, 'batch_size', None) so Argument is unaffected. Added a small private generator helper types._batched(iterable, batch_size) in types.py that core.py calls. You're clear to build on top of 1ebb256 now - please compute your patch.txt as 'git diff 1ebb256..HEAD' (or 5c1239b..HEAD if you want to include my changes too, but 1ebb256..HEAD keeps it disjoint from mine).
